title: subworkflow - aws run ec2 instances
description:
Subworkflow to launch new EC2 instances using AWS Systems Manager

Parameters:

amiId: (Required) AMI ID to use
instanceType: (Required) Instance type (t2.micro, t3.small, etc.)
subnetId: (Optional) VPC subnet ID
securityGroupIds: (Optional) Security group IDs
tagSpecifications: (Optional) Tags for the instances
count: (Optional) Number of instances to launch (default 1)
awsregion: (Required) AWS region
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) AWS OIDC connection

Waits for instances to launch
guide:
## 🚀 **Run EC2 Instances**

Launches new EC2 instances via SSM.
